name: Diabetic Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add sweetener and orange juice to the dry ingredients; stir until combined.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Gradually fold in vegetable shortening until crumbly but cohesive.
6. Gently incorporate chopped nuts and grated orange rind.
7. Shape dough into small cookies and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden.
9. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely before serving.
